content.query:
USE electric_vehicle_explorer

-- This is auto-generated code
SELECT
    TOP 100 *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'vehicle_registration_parquet/year=2024/month=01/',
        DATA_SOURCE = 'electric_vehicle_data_bronze',
        FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
    ) AS [result]

-- Identify interred data types

EXEC sp_describe_first_result_set N'SELECT
    TOP 100 *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK ''vehicle_registration_parquet/year=2024/month=01/'',
        DATA_SOURCE = ''electric_vehicle_data_bronze'',
        FORMAT = ''PARQUET''
    ) AS [result]
'


-- Define columns and data types ; IS ALWAYS BETTER TO SELECT ONLY THE COLUMNS WE ARE ABOUT TO USE
SELECT *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'vehicle_registration_parquet/year=2024/month=01/',
        DATA_SOURCE = 'electric_vehicle_data_bronze',
        FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
    )WITH (
        vehicleId           INT,
        --locationId          SMALLINT,
        --propietaryId        TINYINT,
        --dolVehicleId        INT,
        registrationDate    DATETIME2(7)
    )
    AS [result];




    /*
Assignment
---------
1) Query from folders using wildcat characters.
2) Use filename function.
3) Query from subfolders.
4) Use filepath function to select only from cenrtain partitions.
*/

--1) Query from folders using wildcat characters.
SELECT
    TOP 100 *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'vehicle_registration_parquet/year=2024/month=01/*.parquet',
        DATA_SOURCE = 'electric_vehicle_data_bronze',
        FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
    ) AS vr_data



-- 2) Use filename function.

SELECT
    vr_data.filename() as file_name, 
    vr_data.*
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'vehicle_registration_parquet/year=2024/month=01/*.parquet',
        DATA_SOURCE = 'electric_vehicle_data_bronze',
        FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
    ) AS vr_data

-- 3) Query from sub folders
SELECT TOP 100
    vr_data.filepath() as file_path, 
    vr_data.*
FROM OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'vehicle_registration_parquet/**',
        DATA_SOURCE = 'electric_vehicle_data_bronze',
        FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
    ) AS vr_data

-- 4) Use filepath function to only select from certain partitions
SELECT vr_data.filepath(1) AS year,
vr_data.filepath(2) AS month,
count(1) AS record_count
FROM
OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'vehicle_registration_parquet/year=*/month=*/*.parquet',
        DATA_SOURCE = 'electric_vehicle_data_bronze',
        FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
) AS vr_data
WHERE vr_data.filepath(1) = '2024' AND
vr_data.filepath(2) IN ('06','07','08')
GROUP BY vr_data.filepath(1), vr_data.filepath(2)
ORDER BY vr_data.filepath(1), vr_data.filepath(2)
